summary: White House-branded clip of a single static wide shot of the Great Hall of the People during the arrival ceremony as the U.S. national anthem plays, with a honor guard and flag-lined plaza. It carries a headline title card ('U.S. National Anthem Plays as President Trump Is Greeted by President Xi in Beijing') and a 'TEXT POTUS TO 45470' call-to-action lower-third, but has no cinematic editing, fast cuts, or song track. This is informational/ceremony coverage with promo framing, not a music-driven genre experiment, so out of scope.
notable_text: U.S. National Anthem Plays as President Trump Is Greeted by President Xi in Beijing; TEXT "POTUS" TO 45470 FOR UPDATES FROM THE WHITE HOUSE; THE WHITE HOUSE
